calendar.matters:
UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Steve Naumchik, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Mack Ventures, LLC.
Angelo Orciuoli, Managing Member for plaintiff Mack Ventures, LLC, was placed under oath and testififed.
No appearance by defendant Theodore Nicodem Stanfield.
Defaults were entered against defendants Khalid Khan, individually and doing business as Unus Businesses, and Matthew Smith, individually and doing business as Unus Businesses, on October 6, 2017.
Pre-Judgment Claim of Right to Possession filed by Theodore Nicodem Stanfield on October 3, 2017
Defendant Theodore Nicodem Stanfield filed his answer to plaintiff's complaint on October 12, 2017.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 16, 2017.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed & served on October 27, 2017.

Exhibit 1: Commerical Lease Agreement dated 1/15/16...................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Three-Day Notice to Perform or Quit dated 9/6/17...........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Proof of Service of Three-Day Notice to Perform or Quit....................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Mack Ventures, LLC, and against defendants Khalid Khan and Matthew Smith, both individually and doing business as Unus Businesses, and Theodore Nicodem Stanfield, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $6,826.25.
A/F - $8,500.00.
Costs - $335.00.

Total - $15,661.25.

Plaintiff is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the property located at 5420 Mission Stret, San Francisco, CA 94112.

The Rental Agreement is canceled and the Lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
